Widgets and Properties Supported in Grid Widget

The Check Box, Color Box, Combo Box, Command Button, Drop-Down List, Edit Box, Picture, and Spin Button are supported in the Grid widget, but many of their properties are not.

The following table lists widget properties that are supported in the Grid for at least one widget.

32 rows found
